title: Tangled Climber Escape
description: Tangled Climber Escape is a challenging puzzle game where stranded climbers have become tangled together on a mountainside. Your goal is to move climbers between anchor points and untangle every rope before time runs out. Each level introduces more climbers, tighter spaces, and increasingly complex knots that require both strategy and speed. Use power-ups wisely, clear every tangle, and guide the climbers to safety.
instructions: Click and drag a climber to an available anchor slot Rearrange climbers to remove all rope crossings Use the Cut Rope power-up to remove one rope Use the Freeze Time power-up to temporarily stop the timer Untangle all ropes to complete the level

title: Mech Core: Survivor
description: Mech-Core: Survivor is an intense, fast-paced top-down roguelite survival game. Take control of a heavily armored Mech and fight against endless waves of relentless alien swarms in a dark metallic arena. Collect Nanites from defeated enemies to level up and unlock devastating weapon upgrades like Rapid Lasers, Homing Missiles, and EMP Shockwaves. Combine different abilities to create the ultimate build. Can you survive the invasion and defeat the swarm bosses? Features: Fast-paced top-down shooter combat. Unique level-up system with stacking upgrades. Multiple enemy types and challenging boss fights.
instructions: W A S D or Arrow Keys to move your Mech Use the Mouse to aim Left Click to shoot Auto-fire is enabled by default

title: RebelRun
description: Free All your comrades from the Matrix. Run, jump, crouch, collect coins, unlock characters, and survive as long as possible in this fast-paced endless runner adventure! Dash through an ever-changing world filled with obstacles, enemies, power-ups, and rewards. Test your reflexes as you perform double jumps, dodge hazards, stomp over drones, and collect valuable coins and SuperCoins to unlock new characters. Every run presents a new challenge with procedurally generated environments, making each attempt unique. Use powerful boosts like Coin Magnets, Double Coins, and Protective Shields to push your high score further than ever before.
instructions: Fast tap on screen to jump click again to do a double jump - Spacebar in keyboard Hold screen to stay crouched - CTRL in keyboard

title: Epicrolla
description: Epicrolla is a one-tap isometric roller. Your ball climbs a diamond grid hopping corner to corner — every tap flips its heading left or right, and it bounces off the edges. Survive the gaps, lava, boxes and spinning portals long enough to hit each stages tile goal. Snatch item boxes for Invincibility, Coin Magnet, Slow-Mo, Dodge and Push power-ups, bank coins, and spend them on permanent upgrades, ball skins and a repeatable Second Chance. Easy to pick up, hard to master.
instructions: Mouse click Space or tap to play

title: Stickboy Hook
description: Stickboy Hook is a fast, addictive one-tap swing game where you launch a brave stickman across colorful obstacle courses using a magical rope hook. Tap and hold to throw your grapple, release to fly through the air, then grab the next anchor point to keep your momentum going. Time your swings perfectly to clear gaps, dodge spikes, slide down ramps and rocket through finish lines. Modes: - Classic: 200+ handcrafted levels of increasing difficulty - Hook Mode: pure swinging challenge against the clock - Leaderboard: compete for the best level times
instructions: Tap and hold to throw the hook and swing on the rope Release to let go and fly through the air On desktop left mouse button spacebar On mobile tap and hold anywhere on the screen

title: MergeTrainLastRail
description: MergeTrainLastRail is a relaxing merge puzzle game set aboard a mysterious train. Drag and drop items to merge them into higher-tier objects, fulfill passenger orders, and unlock new chains as you progress. Discover dozens of merge chains, complete story chapters, collect rewards, and expand your board. Features: drag-to-merge gameplay, order fulfillment, chapter-based progression, daily events and bonuses, energy system, and satisfying merge effects. Easy to learn, hard to put down — perfect for quick sessions or long relaxing play.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

title: Drift Car Driving
description: Highway Drift Car Racing Game is an action-packed car racing game designed for players who love high-speed driving, realistic car simulation, and extreme drifting challenges. This car racing game delivers an immersive experience with smooth controls, stunning 3D graphics, and thrilling gameplay that keeps you engaged for hours. If you are a fan of car games, racing games, drifting games, or driving simulator games, then this highway racing game is perfect for you. In this exciting car driving simulator, you will take control of powerful sports cars and race across busy highways filled with traffic.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse

title: Pattern Puzzle 3D
description: Welcome to Pattern Puzzle 3D, an exciting brain-training puzzle game designed to challenge your observation skills, logical thinking, and pattern recognition abilities. Dive into a colorful 3D world filled with engaging puzzles that test your concentration while providing endless entertainment for players of all ages. In Pattern Puzzle 3D, every level presents a unique challenge where you must carefully analyze shapes, colors, symbols, and patterns to find the correct solution. The gameplay starts simple, allowing you to learn the mechanics, but gradually becomes more challenging as new puzzle elements and complex designs are introduced.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

title: Monsters Impact-3
description: The power is in your finger! Tap the screen to hit the monsters and click the special buttons to unleash your power. Kill the hordes of monsters and become the real monster hunter. Don’t stop clicking and be the hero of this epic war against monsters and other terrifying creatures. This game is one of the best RPG idle game.
instructions: The power is in your finger Tap the screen to hit the monsters and click the special buttons to unleash your power Kill the hordes of monsters and become the real monster hunter Don t stop clicking and be the hero of this epic war against monsters and

title: Mini guardians
description: Play to MINI GUARDIANS : CASTLE DEFENSE and lead your warriors and guardians to defend your castle, dungeons and towers from rogues ennemies. MINI GUARDIANS : CASTLE DEFENSE is an epic and classic RPG game with pixel arts graphic style, like the 80s arcade games. All you have to do is using your troops to defeats rogues and save the dungeons.
instructions: Play to MINI GUARDIANS CASTLE DEFENSE and lead your warriors and guardians to defend your castle dungeons and towers from rogues ennemies MINI GUARDIANS CASTLE DEFENSE is an epic and classic RPG game with pixel arts graphic style like the 80s arc

title: Maya Brick Breaker-3
description: This is a brick-breaker game. The bottom of the screen to move the platform. Avoid the ball from falling to the bottom of the screen. It's a game in which you need to destroy all the bricks.
instructions: This is a brick-breaker game The bottom of the screen to move the platform Avoid the ball from falling to the bottom of the screen It s a game in which you need to destroy all the bricks

title: Stone Shooter
description: Welcome to Stone Shooter, an exciting and addictive arcade shooting adventure that challenges your aim, timing, and precision skills. Get ready to launch stones at various targets, break obstacles, and complete thrilling levels packed with action and fun. Whether you are looking for a quick casual gaming session or a challenging accuracy-based experience, Stone Shooter delivers endless entertainment for players of all ages.
instructions: Move Left or Right Use Keyboard Arrows

title: Zoo Restaurant
description: Run the cutest food business ever in Zoo Restaurant! This addictive restaurant game lets you serve adorable animal customers while building an amazing dessert empire. Keep your hungry customers happy while your business keeps growing! It mixes relaxing merge mechanics with fun Simulation gameplay. Fans of restaurant management games will love the rewarding progression system.
instructions: Tap Drag to play

title: Cute Animal World
description: Manage your own animal paradise in Cute Animal World. Play as Senti, build a grand stage for cowboy dreams, and run the entire animal city. Hand out flyers to attract visitors and hire music-loving performers to make your park lively! Enjoy the perfect mix of casual idle fun, management simulation and adorable animal elements, all while designing your dream park!
instructions: Click and drag to play

title: Shoot The Villain!
description: Shoot The Villain! - is a bollywood inspired game where Amitabh is hero and you have 6 villains who appear time to time. You have a gun to adjust the direction of and adjustable deflector blocks who help you to target the villain with the obstacles. Have fun!
instructions: Click tap on the traingular deflector blocks so that bullet hits the villain

title: Odd Kicked Out Quick
description: Odd Kicked Out - Quick is more of a rapid-fire game which asks you to choose the odd one out from sports items, fruits, vowels, consonants, candies, numbers 0-9 etc. You have to easily identify odd one and click on it. Have fun :)
instructions: Click the odd one
